findings.message: phases/index.json records phases 0 through 47 as completed; phase 48 is this final completion review.
resource_manifest.json contains 129 required resources and all are marked final.
Build Settings include Assets/Scenes/Stage1.unity and do not rely on SampleScene as the playable scene.
Latest Unity MCP validation from phase 47 passed EditMode 6/6 and PlayMode 14/14.
Generated player deterministic smoke exits with code 0 and logs STAGE1_SMOKE_SUCCESS.

Earlier final playtest gaps were closed by phases 42 through 47: hit areas, map markers, monster/hiding balance, puzzle finale walkthrough, game-over restart, and deterministic generated-player smoke.

completion_decision.reason: All required Stage 1 MVP work listed by AGENTS.md, the design completion criteria, and subsequent NEXT_ACTION.md records is now covered by completed Harness phases and passing validation artifacts.
